name: Sentiment Analysis Workflow
description: A workflow to collect, analyze, and report on public sentiment about a specific topic.

config.title: Data Collection
config.agent_goal: Collect comprehensive data from various sources.
config.agent_backstory: You are an expert at gathering information from the internet.

config.title: Data Filtering
config.agent_goal: Filter out irrelevant noise from data.
config.agent_backstory: You have a sharp eye for relevant information.

config.title: Sentiment Analysis
config.agent_goal: Accurately determine the sentiment of text.
config.agent_backstory: You are a psychologist specializing in crowd sentiment.

config.title: Report Compilation
config.agent_backstory: You are a professional technical writer.
